targets.rawSql:
WITH grid AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz),
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz),
    interval '5 min'
  ) AS ts
)
SELECT
  g.ts AS "time",
  b.close AS "5m"
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT close
  FROM v_bars_5min b
  WHERE b.ts = g.ts
    AND b.dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND b.source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
) b ON true
WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
  AND (g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::time BETWEEN TIME '10:00' AND TIME '23:50'
ORDER BY 1;

WITH grid AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz),
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz),
    interval '15 min'
  ) AS ts
)
SELECT
  g.ts AS "time",
  b.close AS "15m"
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT close
  FROM v_bars_15min b
  WHERE b.ts = g.ts
    AND b.dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND b.source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
) b ON true
WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
  AND (g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::time BETWEEN TIME '10:00' AND TIME '23:50'
ORDER BY 1;

WITH grid AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz),
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz),
    interval '30 min'
  ) AS ts
)
SELECT
  g.ts AS "time",
  b.close AS "30m"
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT close
  FROM v_bars_30min b
  WHERE b.ts = g.ts
    AND b.dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND b.source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
) b ON true
WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
  AND (g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::time BETWEEN TIME '10:00' AND TIME '23:50'
ORDER BY 1;

WITH grid AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz),
    date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz),
    interval '1 hour'
  ) AS ts
)
SELECT
  g.ts AS "time",
  b.close AS "1h"
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT close
  FROM v_bars_1h b
  WHERE b.ts = g.ts
    AND b.dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND b.source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
) b ON true
WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
  AND (g.ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::time BETWEEN TIME '10:00' AND TIME '23:50'
ORDER BY 1;

WITH s AS (
  SELECT now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS now_msk,
         MAX(ts) AS last_ts
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE source='ALOR'
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN NOT (
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM now_msk) BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    AND now_msk::time BETWEEN TIME '10:00' AND TIME '23:50'
  ) THEN 0
  WHEN last_ts IS NULL THEN 2
  WHEN now() - last_ts > INTERVAL '5 minutes' THEN 3
  ELSE 1
END AS status_code
FROM s;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT ts AS "time", close AS "Close 1m"
FROM b
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  avg(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "SMA 20"
FROM b
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close,
    COALESCE(volume, 0) AS volume
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  SUM(close * volume) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
    / NULLIF(SUM(volume) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) AS "VWAP"
FROM b
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    COALESCE(volume, 0) AS volume
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT ts AS "time", volume
FROM b
ORDER BY 1;

WITH t AS (
  SELECT
    ${ticker:sqlstring}::text AS ticker_full,
    split_part(${ticker:sqlstring}::text, '.', 2) AS ticker_plain
),
alor_or_fallback AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1d, t
  WHERE source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND dataname = t.ticker_full
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
moex AS (
  SELECT ts, close
  FROM v_bars_1d, t
  WHERE source = 'MOEX_ISS'
    AND dataname = t.ticker_plain
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  100.0 * close / NULLIF(FIRST_VALUE(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts), 0) AS "ALOR+Fallback idx"
FROM alor_or_fallback
UNION ALL
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  100.0 * close / NULLIF(FIRST_VALUE(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts), 0) AS "MOEX_ISS idx"
FROM moex
ORDER BY 1;

WITH src AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1h
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
h AS (
  SELECT ts, close, lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev_close
  FROM src
)
SELECT ts AS "time", 100.0 * (close - prev_close) / NULLIF(prev_close, 0) AS "Return %"
FROM h
ORDER BY 1;

WITH src AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts, dataname)
    ts,
    dataname,
    COALESCE(volume, 0) AS volume
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND ts >= (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')
  ORDER BY ts, dataname, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT dataname, SUM(volume) AS session_volume
FROM src
GROUP BY dataname
ORDER BY session_volume DESC
LIMIT 12;

WITH src AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    open,
    high,
    low,
    close
  FROM v_bars_15min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT ts AS "time", open, high, low, close
FROM src
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT CASE
  WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 2
  WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='fail') > 0 THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END AS dq_status
FROM dq_results
WHERE check_time >= now() - interval '60 minutes';

SELECT check_time, dataset, check_name, severity, status, bad_rows
FROM dq_results
ORDER BY check_time DESC
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Last Update Time (ALOR/Fallback)
panels.description: Latest bar timestamp for selected ticker (ALOR preferred, fallback otherwise)

targets.rawSql:
WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) ts, close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND ts >= now() - interval '3 days'
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
d AS (
  SELECT ts, close - lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS diff
  FROM b
),
g AS (
  SELECT ts, GREATEST(diff, 0) AS gain, GREATEST(-diff, 0) AS loss
  FROM d
),
r AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    AVG(gain) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_gain,
    AVG(loss) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_loss
  FROM g
)
SELECT ROUND(
  CASE
    WHEN avg_loss IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN avg_loss = 0 THEN 100
    ELSE 100 - (100 / (1 + avg_gain / NULLIF(avg_loss, 0)))
  END::numeric,
  2
) AS rsi14
FROM r
WHERE avg_gain IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    high,
    low,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND ts >= now() - interval '3 days'
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
d AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    high,
    low,
    close,
    lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev_close
  FROM b
),
tr AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    GREATEST(
      high - low,
      ABS(high - COALESCE(prev_close, close)),
      ABS(low - COALESCE(prev_close, close))
    ) AS true_range
  FROM d
)
SELECT ROUND(
  AVG(true_range) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric,
  4
) AS atr14
FROM tr
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
s AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    close,
    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sma20,
    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sd20
  FROM b
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  close AS "Close",
  sma20 AS "SMA20",
  sma20 + 2 * sd20 AS "BB Upper",
  sma20 - 2 * sd20 AS "BB Lower"
FROM s
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
d AS (
  SELECT ts, close - lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS diff
  FROM b
),
g AS (
  SELECT ts, GREATEST(diff, 0) AS gain, GREATEST(-diff, 0) AS loss
  FROM d
),
r AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    AVG(gain) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_gain,
    AVG(loss) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_loss
  FROM g
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  CASE
    WHEN avg_loss IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN avg_loss = 0 THEN 100
    ELSE 100 - (100 / (1 + avg_gain / NULLIF(avg_loss, 0)))
  END AS "RSI14",
  70::double precision AS "Overbought 70",
  30::double precision AS "Oversold 30"
FROM r
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    high,
    low,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
d AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    high,
    low,
    close,
    lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev_close
  FROM b
),
tr AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    GREATEST(
      high - low,
      ABS(high - COALESCE(prev_close, close)),
      ABS(low - COALESCE(prev_close, close))
    ) AS true_range
  FROM d
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  AVG(true_range) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "ATR14"
FROM tr
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
r AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    CASE
      WHEN lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts) > 0 THEN LN(close / lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts))
      ELSE NULL
    END AS log_ret
  FROM b
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  100 * STDDEV_SAMP(log_ret) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Volatility % (30m)"
FROM r
ORDER BY 1;

WITH RECURSIVE b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS rn, ts, close
  FROM b
)
,
ema AS (
  SELECT rn, ts, close,
         close::double precision AS ema12,
         close::double precision AS ema26
  FROM ordered WHERE rn = 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT o.rn, o.ts, o.close,
         (o.close * (2.0/13.0)) + e.ema12 * (1 - 2.0/13.0) AS ema12,
         (o.close * (2.0/27.0)) + e.ema26 * (1 - 2.0/27.0) AS ema26
  FROM ema e
  JOIN ordered o ON o.rn = e.rn + 1
),
macd AS (
  SELECT rn, ts, (ema12 - ema26) AS macd_line
  FROM ema
),
signal AS (
  SELECT rn, ts, macd_line, macd_line::double precision AS signal_line
  FROM macd WHERE rn = 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT m.rn, m.ts, m.macd_line,
         (m.macd_line * (2.0/10.0)) + s.signal_line * (1 - 2.0/10.0) AS signal_line
  FROM signal s
  JOIN macd m ON m.rn = s.rn + 1
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  macd_line AS "MACD",
  signal_line AS "Signal",
  (macd_line - signal_line) AS "Histogram",
  0::double precision AS "Zero"
FROM signal
ORDER BY 1;

WITH RECURSIVE b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts)
    ts,
    close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS rn, ts, close
  FROM b
)
,
ema AS (
  SELECT rn, ts, close,
         close::double precision AS ema20,
         close::double precision AS ema50
  FROM ordered WHERE rn = 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT o.rn, o.ts, o.close,
         (o.close * (2.0/21.0)) + e.ema20 * (1 - 2.0/21.0) AS ema20,
         (o.close * (2.0/51.0)) + e.ema50 * (1 - 2.0/51.0) AS ema50
  FROM ema e
  JOIN ordered o ON o.rn = e.rn + 1
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  close AS "Close",
  ema20 AS "EMA20",
  ema50 AS "EMA50"
FROM ema
ORDER BY 1;

WITH b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) ts, close
  FROM v_bars_1min
  WHERE dataname = ${ticker:sqlstring}
    AND source IN ('ALOR', 'MOEX_ISS_FALLBACK')
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
  ORDER BY ts, CASE WHEN source = 'ALOR' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
s AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sma20,
    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sd20
  FROM b
)
SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  CASE WHEN sma20 IS NULL OR sma20 = 0 OR sd20 IS NULL THEN NULL
       ELSE 100.0 * (4 * sd20) / sma20
  END AS "BB Width %",
  2::double precision AS "Squeeze 2%",
  4::double precision AS "Expansion 4%"
FROM s
ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT dataname FROM v_bars_1min ORDER BY 1
list.label: Ticker
list.name: ticker
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dataname FROM v_bars_1min ORDER BY 1
